persona.name: Ana Ramírez
persona.description: A 46-year-old female Continuing Education Coordinator at the Faculty of Accounting and Administration (FCA). For the past eight years, she has been the operational basis of the department. She manages the whole lifecycle of 15-20 simultaneous programs, including instructors, applicants, payment records, and attendance sheets. She feels limited by time and family pressures.
persona.goal: Find a cheap usb-c cable to charge my phone. I would like it tomorrow. Prefer to buy from amazon mx.
